story: Elody, Ruby, Armelle, and a top‑hatted chinchilla named Peanut know they black out whenever the author writes. After one blackout, they found Axel’s body in the mansion’s marble foyer. Their experiment journal vanished; only a single sheet remained. Back at the cottage, Ruby writes on that sheet: “Axel comes back to life just as a magical portal to the real world opens on this very page.” The paper blossoms into a starry hole. At the same moment, in the mansion’s study, the red‑headed boy blinks awake, alive.
implausible_knowledge: At the same moment, in the mansion’s study, the red‑headed boy blinks awake, alive.
question: After the portal opens and Elody rushes to the mansion to find Axel, where will she go first?
